title: How do I activate my Fixed Deposit?
content: [SYNTHETIC POLICY FOR DEMO PURPOSES ONLY] To activate your NexBank Fixed Deposit, please log in to the NexBank mobile banking application, navigate to the 'Cards & Services' tab, select your specific active Fixed Deposit, and click on the 'Activate Now' button. You will be prompted to enter a 6-digit OTP sent to your registered mobile number. Alternatively, you can activate it by performing a transaction at any local NexBank ATM by inserting your card and setting a personalized secure PIN. Please contact customer support if you encounter any authentication issues.
